name: get_place_info
description: Get detailed information about a specific place or location (address, rating, hours, phone, website)

query.description: The place to search for (e.g., 'Empire State Building', 'Starbucks Times Square', 'Central Park')

name: get_transit_directions
description: Get real-time public transit directions with exact departure times, arrival times, bus/subway lines, and stop-by-stop details. Uses departure_time=now for current routes. This is the DEFAULT for all direction queries unless the user explicitly asks for driving, walking, or cycling.

origin.description: Starting address (full street address for best results)

destination.description: Destination address (full street address for best results)

name: get_directions
description: Open Google Maps in browser showing driving, walking, or cycling directions. Only use when user EXPLICITLY requests driving, walking, or cycling — NOT for transit or default queries.

mode.description: Travel mode: DRIVE, WALK, or BICYCLE
